calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Plaintiff Helen Kong appearing on her own behalf, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Gretchen Whelan.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2702 23rd Street, San Francisco, California 94110, County of San Francisco.

Damages $7800.00
Holdover damages $1210.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
For a Total Judgment of $9520.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Assigned To Trial Court
